steps.title: Substitute the equations
steps.content: Replace $y$ in the second equation using $y=x+26$: $$(x+26)^2=x+26.$$

steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Let $u=x+26$, so $u^2=u$ gives $u(u-1)=0$, meaning $x+26=0$ or $x+26=1$. Thus $x=-26$ or $x=-25$.

steps.title: Pick a valid x
steps.content: Among the choices, $x=-25$ appears. That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
